message.content:
Explore the following directories to understand the deployment setup:

1. D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams-system\deployment - look at all files, especially CI/CD configs, K8s manifests, nginx configs
2. D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams-system\prod-deploy - look at all files related to exams-system deployment
3. D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams-system\mdt\mt-tool-web - understand the project structure (package.json, Dockerfile, any existing CI/CD)
4. D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams-system\skills\k8s-deploy - read the skill definition

Be very thorough - read all config files, Dockerfiles, .gitlab-ci.yml, nginx configs, k8s manifests. I need the full picture of how exams-system is deployed so I can replicate it for mt-tool-web.
